form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 7 on April 9 over 515m at Sandown behind Gnarlack beaten 9 lengths (30.33). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 525m. Racing well and has to be included.
